rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"payload.find({limit:0}) discards results; markAllRead was counting the query result (always 0), not actual matching rows.","scope":"src/services/notifications.ts:42-50"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Dynamic $and/$or operators in payload.find() create SQL injection surface even with the ORM; prefer explicit typed queries over raw object merging.","scope":"src/services/notifications.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Pipeline verification tasks generate artifacts (event logs, stage diaries, graph nodes) that get committed alongside any real changes — review must separate signal from noise.","scope":"pipeline/kody"},{"kind":"decision","text":"The task decomposition verification succeeded: @kody decompose correctly split the composite notification-system task into parallel sub-tasks covering models, services, routes, utils, and tests.","scope":"pipeline/kody"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Review stage should produce a verdict (PASS/FAIL), summa
